query: 桜新町 pizza Mafia マスカルポーネ ピザ
objective: 保存済みtweetからピザ店候補を探索する
notes: Actual source_ref observed from read-only search_memory over runs/x_data.sqlite3. Explore candidate only; not answer support.

query: 北千住 ラーメン 店 翔竜 閉店
objective: bookmark / tweet / media relationを束ねて同一tweet由来の候補を集める
notes: Actual source_ref observed from read-only search_memory. The source has duplicate lineage across tweet/bookmark/media and same_url relation evidence in metadata.

query: Codex AI agents OpenAI Obsidian 自動化
objective: 候補を作業メモ化できるがanswerではないCodex関連材料を集める
notes: Actual working_note mode returns the topic_thread projection source_ref before individual tweet refs. Working note mode must not promote to answer.

query: 強化学習 ロボット 学習 evidence package
objective: source_refから既存evidence_viewへ復元できることを確認する
notes: Actual evidence_view source_ref observed in memory_artifacts for context_chunk/citation rows. context_budget is 10 because the current strict evidence artifact query ranks after a recency-limited candidate set and the 強化学習 rows are present at positions 8-10.

query: ネットワーク 機械学習 勉強 answer citation support
objective: ネットワーク関連の保存材料についてcitation / claim_support / db_backed_validationを要求する
notes: Uses existing evidence_view artifacts. Eval v2 answer path is diagnostic fake_local_answer_provider and must not be treated as model-quality proof.

query: 存在しないはずの架空プロジェクト名 xyznotfound
objective: 候補が出てもanswerにしてはいけない曖昧検索をneeds_review材料として扱う
notes: Read-only search showed lexical overmatch on 存在しない. This case is deliberately synthesize/not answer, so candidate retrieval is allowed but assertion is not.

objective: stale / partial observationが実データに入ったときneeds_reviewになることを確認する保留ケース
notes: Current real DB has no stale/partial source observations; only needs_review workflow control_state artifacts were observed. Human review should decide whether to replace this with a true stale/partial source case before eval-v2 run.
